title: PlayerHeads+
description: Lightweight plugin that lets you craft player heads, and then rename them in an anvil, to get any player's head!
body:
# PlayerHeads+
## Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kHL5cWk7dRo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Crafting Recipe:
![Player Head Crafting Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee7a356f0c8b9b1f9b39eb7f879ee4cb320e97d3.png)

## Usage:
PlayerHeads+ is a lightweight plugin/mod that lets you craft player heads, and rename them in an anvil to change their appearance.
This plugin/mod can be used for decorations, building, and general fun (for example getting all player's heads in your home or at spawn)
